title: ASR Outdoor Mini Plastic Key Chain Sized Emergency Flashlight w/ Lanyard Black
description:
Flashlights are an item that is always needed - that is why you have one on your cellphone. There is a problem with that though, THEY ARE TOO BIG! Many times when we need a light it's for a tiny dark space or crevice. That is why you need this flashlight - it's versatile and easily stored. You can store it in a glove compartment, on a boat, in your night stand, pocket, purse, tackle box, garage and anywhere else you might need additional light. Whether you are traveling, camping, boating or just hanging around the house this is the flashlight for you to shine a little light in those dark spaces.
